ingredients_text: _Cashew nuts_ (30%), dried sweetened cranberries (25%) (cranberries (60%) cane sugar (39%), sunflower oil), raisins (25%) (raisins 99,5%, sunflower oil), roasted _peanuts_ (20%). May also contain other nuts, sesame seeds, soya, milk, sulphur dioxide.
